subject: GRB050117a:  Radio Observations
body:
Dale A. Frail reports on behalf of a larger collaboration:

"On January 19.08 UT the VLA was used to observe a region toward the
refined XRT position (GCN#2955) of the Swift burst, GRB 050117A (GCN
#2952 and 2962). At a frequency of 8.46 GHz no emission was detected
above a 4-sigma level of 130 microJy within the 30-arcsec diameter
error circle."
